problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
